subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of the Master in Haifa, 1919-08-06
subcodes.first_line: When the mujtahids and Nasiri'd-Din Shah sent Shaykh 'Abdu'l-Husayn to 'Iraq, and he began agitating against the Blessed Perfection
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
